prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ATSI-STD Product Type: SOLDERING_IRON Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 60w Universal Household Arts & Crafts Adjustable Temp Soldering Iron Description: This soldering iron is lightweight, has a pencil like handle, and has adjustable temperature settings for delicate work.

The 60 watt element allows for quicker melting and easier detail work as compared to other lower watt units. The adjustable temperature through the fine tip feature allows you to set the iron between 392°F to 842°F for various types of detailed projects.

The Adjustable Soldering Iron comes with a stand that keeps the hot iron off your work surface and enables you to do precise work with more hands on capabilities. Search Terms: Soldering Tool Watt Wattage Iron Features: - Adjustable Temperature: 392°F to 842°F (200°C to 450°C) - Wattage: 60 - Length: 11" - Volts: 110 - Removable Tip === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 60W Adjustable Temperature Soldering Iron

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 60W Adjustable Temperature Soldering Iron

anthropic.title_differentiation: 60 Watt, 392F To 842F Temperature Range, Pencil Handle, Includes Stand, Removable Tip

openai.title_differentiation: 392F To 842F Adjustable Heat, Fine Tip Detail Work, Stand Included, Removable Tip, 11" Length
